en_title: Bethesda Chief Todd Howard Issues Rare Reddit Comment, Fans Immediately Call for The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered Patch
cn_title: 贝塞斯达陶德·霍华德罕见现身Reddit，玩家立即催更《上古卷轴4：湮灭 复刻版》
subtitle: 一发言就被催补丁

paragraphs.en: Bethesda chief Todd Howard has issued a rare post on Reddit, telling gamers that the developer is "constantly listening” to fans on the website. And so, unsurprisingly, fans have responded with requests.
paragraphs.cn: 贝塞斯达负责人陶德·霍华德罕见地在Reddit发帖，告诉玩家开发商一直在倾听该网站上的粉丝意见。因此，粉丝随即提出各种请求，也就不足为奇了。

paragraphs.en: Howard posted in the wake of Bethesda's announcement of its roadmap of releases over the coming years . With The Elder Scrolls 6 taking up Bethesda Game Studios’ attention, Howard confirmed Fallout 5 is now in pre-production , New Vegas developer Obsidian is working on a new Fallout game, Fallout 3 and New Vegas remasters are in the works, and Starfield is still alive .
paragraphs.cn: 霍华德发帖前，贝塞斯达刚刚公布了未来数年的作品路线图。随着《上古卷轴6》占据贝塞斯达游戏工作室的主要精力，霍华德确认《辐射5》现已进入前期制作，《新维加斯》开发商黑曜石正在制作一款新的《辐射》游戏，《辐射3》和《新维加斯》的复刻版也在开发中，而《星空》依然没有被放弃。

paragraphs.en: That announcement itself followed a significant round of layoffs across Xbox, which hit Bethesda and its various studios hard as new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma continues her “reset” of Microsoft’s gaming business. That reset involves doubling down on Xbox’s core franchises, and for Bethesda that means more The Elder Scrolls and Fallout games, more quickly .
paragraphs.cn: 在此之前，XBOX刚经历了一轮大规模裁员。随着XBOX新任首席执行官Asha Sharma继续「重整」微软的游戏业务，贝塞斯达及其旗下多家工作室也受到严重冲击。这次重整意味着XBOX将进一步押注核心IP；对贝塞斯达而言，就是以更快速度推出更多《上古卷轴》和《辐射》游戏。

paragraphs.en: Howard then took the unusual step of actually posting on Reddit, calling himself a “professional lurker” who gets “great ideas” from the website. He called on fans to continue to provide feedback and post their ideas for future Bethesda games, which he may or may not take inspiration from.
paragraphs.cn: 随后，霍华德罕见地亲自在Reddit发帖，自称是会从该网站获得「绝妙点子」的「职业潜水员」。他呼吁粉丝继续提供反馈，并发布对贝塞斯达未来游戏的构想；至于他会不会从中汲取灵感，则不得而知。

paragraphs.en: This is Howard's first comment on Reddit in six months. The last was to simply say "Dear Reddit, please never change," in a thread about someone who modded Todd Howard into Fallout 4 . Before that, Howard posted on Reddit three years ago to thank fans for their "passion and excitement" for Starfield. And, before that, Howard posted five years ago as part of a Reddit Ask Me Anything celebrating Skyrim’s 10th anniversary . In that AMA, Howard said he hadn't posted on the internet in 15 years.
paragraphs.cn: 这是霍华德六个月来首次在Reddit发表评论。上一次，他只是在一个有人把陶德·霍华德做成《辐射4》Mod的帖子下写道：「亲爱的Reddit，请永远不要改变。」再往前，霍华德曾在三年前发帖，感谢粉丝对《星空》的「热情与期待」；五年前，他还参加过一场庆祝《上古卷轴5：天际》10周年的Reddit问答活动。在那次问答中，霍华德称自己已有15年没有在网上发帖。

paragraphs.en: I don’t think this means Howard is all of a sudden going to start posting a lot in Reddit or even online generally. But, clearly, this is the start of a new era under Microsoft, one that will see a lot more Fallout, that’s for sure. It stands to reason that more communication will be needed to help get Bethesda's vision across.
paragraphs.cn: 我不认为这意味着霍华德会突然开始频繁在Reddit，乃至互联网上发言。但这显然标志着微软旗下一个新时代的开始，可以肯定的是，未来会有更多《辐射》内容。为了让外界理解贝塞斯达的愿景，公司自然需要进行更多沟通。

paragraphs.en: Unsurprisingly, Howard's Reddit post was followed immediately by requests from fans, the first of which called for patches for The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered . "Thanks Todd. Please get Virtuous to keep patching Oblivion and give it as much love as you guys gave Skyrim, because it feels abandoned right now which is a shame," said redditor GamerLove1.
paragraphs.cn: 不出所料，霍华德的Reddit帖子立即引来粉丝请愿，其中最先出现的请求就是为《上古卷轴4：湮灭 复刻版》推出补丁。Reddit用户GamerLove1表示：「谢谢你，陶德。请让维塔士继续为《湮灭》制作补丁，像你们关照《天际》那样关照它。它现在给人的感觉是已经被放弃了，这实在令人遗憾。」

paragraphs.en: As we reported in May, The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered is without a patch on PC since July 2025 , and still suffers from issues that plagued it at launch, including worsening performance the more you play.
paragraphs.cn: 正如我们5月报道的那样，《上古卷轴4：湮灭 复刻版》PC版自2025年7月以来一直没有获得补丁，首发时困扰游戏的问题也依然存在，其中包括游玩时间越长，性能表现就越差。

paragraphs.en: Will Oblivion Remastered eventually get some love? Oblivion Remastered, overall, seems like a big success for Bethesda, which contracted Virtuos to help remake its much-loved role-playing game using Unreal Engine 5. It’s seen over 9 million players , and Howard himself told IGN in December that the studio was “really, really pleased with how well it did.” So it seems somewhat odd that the game hasn’t seen an update in so long. Oblivion Remastered launches for the Nintendo Switch 2 on August 11, 2026, so perhaps we'll see a big update for all versions then.
paragraphs.cn: 《湮灭 复刻版》最终会得到更多关照吗？总体而言，这款游戏似乎为贝塞斯达取得了巨大成功。贝塞斯达委托维塔士协助使用Unreal Engine 5重制这款深受喜爱的角色扮演游戏，玩家人数已超过900万。霍华德本人也曾在去年12月告诉IGN，工作室对游戏的表现「真的、真的非常满意」。因此，游戏如此长时间没有更新，多少显得有些奇怪。《湮灭 复刻版》将于2026年8月11日登陆任天堂Nintendo Switch 2，届时或许会为所有版本推出一次大型更新。

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, Bethesda has said that while it won't host a traditional Fallout Day broadcast this year, it's planning something special for Fallout's 30th anniversary in 2027, when Fallout Day will be celebrated live in Washington, D.C. Also next year, Bethesda plans to release a major Fallout 76 expansion called Raven Rock, which acts as a prequel story to Fallout 3.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，贝塞斯达表示，今年不会举办传统的「辐射日」直播，但正在为2027年《辐射》系列30周年筹备特别活动，届时「辐射日」将在华盛顿特区举行现场庆典。贝塞斯达还计划于明年推出《辐射76》大型资料片「渡鸦岩」，其故事将作为《辐射3》的前传。

opus_summary: 陶德·霍华德罕见在Reddit发帖，随即被粉丝催促为《上古卷轴4：湮灭 复刻版》更新补丁。该作PC版自2025年7月起未获补丁，玩家期待8月11日发售新版本时迎来更新。
